performancePanel.title: Performance & Resource Management
performancePanel.description: Monitor and manage CPU, memory, and background resources used by the extension.

cpu.loadingDesc: The first sample takes about 2 seconds.
cpu.unavailableDesc: Requires the Chrome system.cpu permission (or open in the extension side panel).

unload.title: Resource reclaim policy
unload.autoUnloadDesc: Close the Offscreen Document when the background is idle and no tasks are pending (best-effort).

storage.title: Where data is stored
storage.chatPromptsDesc: Chat settings, prompts, and lightweight preferences use shared storage with startup snapshots or bootstrap mirrors.
storage.memoryDesc: Memory data is stored in IndexedDB, and vectors are generated online by the configured model.

tips.title: Tips
tips.swMemoryLimit: In multi-tab scenarios, be aware of the shared Service Worker memory limit
